Up and Running with Protractor

Protractor is an end-to-end testing library for AngularJS. This tutorial covers the following:

  • Installation for Mac OSX and Windows
  • Setting up Protractor
  • Writing a Test

Installation

NodeJS is a pre-requsite. Install node for Windows here and for OSX via HomeBrew

Once NodeJS is installed, run the <pre>npm install –g protractor</pre> command. This will install everything on your machine that you need to run Protractor.

Go to your command line again and type <pre>protractor -–version.</pre> If you see a version, it means that node was successfully installed.

Setup

Writing your test
